description: HP/Agilent 8563E portable spectrum analyzer, 9 kHz to 26.5 GHz. Part of the 8560 E-series; uses the 8560-series command language (not SCPI).

identity.description: Returns the model number (e.g. HP8563E/EC) and installed options.

commands.name: preset
commands.description: Instrument preset. Returns the analyzer to a known state.

commands.name: identify
commands.description: Outputs the analyzer model number and installed options.

commands.name: center_frequency
commands.description: Sets or queries the center frequency, placing the analyzer in center/span mode.

commands.name: frequency_span
commands.description: Sets or queries the frequency span (full width of the display).

commands.name: start_frequency
commands.description: Sets or queries the start (left edge) frequency.

commands.name: stop_frequency
commands.description: Sets or queries the stop (right edge) frequency.

commands.name: center_frequency_step
commands.description: Sets or queries the center-frequency step size (used by the UP/DN step keys).

commands.name: reference_level
commands.description: Sets or queries the reference level (amplitude at the top graticule line).

commands.name: resolution_bandwidth
commands.description: Sets or queries the resolution bandwidth.

commands.name: video_bandwidth
commands.description: Sets or queries the video bandwidth.

commands.name: sweep_time
commands.description: Sets or queries the sweep time.

commands.name: take_sweep
commands.description: Takes one full sweep, then returns. Used to synchronise measurements.

commands.name: marker_peak_search
commands.description: Positions the active marker. MKPK HI finds the highest peak.

commands.name: marker_frequency
commands.description: Sets or queries the active marker frequency.

commands.name: marker_amplitude
commands.description: Queries the amplitude of the active marker.

commands.name: marker_to_center_frequency
commands.description: Sets the center frequency equal to the active marker frequency.
